metadata.title: eShopOnWeb Enterprise Knowledge Graph
metadata.confidence_scale: HIGH=direct code evidence | MEDIUM=inferred from patterns | LOW=assumed from naming | ASSUMED=no evidence found

capabilities.name: Product Catalog Management
capabilities.evidence: BA Agent 1 Chunk 1: CatalogItem CRUD endpoints, CreateCatalogItemEndpoint, UpdateCatalogItemEndpoint, DeleteCatalogItemEndpoint confirmed in src/PublicApi/

capabilities.name: Shopping Basket Management
capabilities.evidence: BA Agent 1 Chunk 2: BasketService.AddItemToBasket, SetQuantities, DeleteBasketAsync, TransferBasketAsync confirmed in src/ApplicationCore/Services/BasketService.cs

capabilities.name: Order Placement & History
capabilities.evidence: BA Agent 1 Chunk 2: OrderService.CreateOrderAsync, CustomerOrdersSpecification in src/ApplicationCore

capabilities.name: Customer Identity & Authentication
capabilities.evidence: BA Agent 1 Chunk 3: IdentityTokenClaimService, AuthenticateEndpoint, ASP.NET Core Identity seeding in src/Infrastructure/Identity/

capabilities.name: Admin Catalog Portal
capabilities.evidence: BA Agent 1 Chunk 5: BlazorAdmin SPA, CatalogItemService CRUD, CachedCatalogItemServiceDecorator in src/BlazorAdmin/

capabilities.name: Customer Storefront Browsing
capabilities.evidence: BA Agent 1 Chunk 6 validation queue item 7: Web Razor pages for browse/basket/checkout/order history referenced in specifications but source not extracted

capabilities.name: Customer Account Registration
capabilities.evidence: BA Agent 2 Output 2: Register.cshtml.cs OnPostAsync confirmed; email confirmation broken (stub)

capabilities.name: Anonymous Basket & Session Transfer
capabilities.evidence: BA Agent 2 Output 2: TransferAnonymousBasketToUserAsync in Login.cshtml.cs; BASKET_COOKIENAME cookie; BasketService.TransferBasketAsync

processes.name: Browse and Filter Products
processes.evidence: Inferred from CatalogFilterSpecification, CatalogFilterPaginatedSpecification; Web browse pages not in extraction

processes.name: Add Item to Basket
processes.evidence: BA Agent 2 Output 2: AddItemToBasket process steps 1-6; BR-13, BR-14, BR-15 confirmed

processes.name: Update Basket Quantities
processes.evidence: BA Agent 2 Output 2: Update Basket process; BasketService.SetQuantities; BR-16 zero-item removal

processes.name: Transfer Anonymous Basket on Login
processes.evidence: BA Agent 2 Output 2: 7-step transfer process; Login.cshtml.cs TransferAnonymousBasketToUserAsync; BR-17, BR-18

processes.name: Place Order at Checkout
processes.evidence: BA Agent 2 Output 2: 8-step checkout process; OrderService.CreateOrderAsync; BR-20, BR-21, BR-22, BR-24

processes.name: API Authentication and Token Issuance
processes.evidence: BA Agent 2 Output 2: 8-step auth process; AuthenticateEndpoint; IdentityTokenClaimService; BR-27, BR-29, BR-30

processes.name: Customer Registration with Email Confirmation
processes.evidence: BA Agent 2 Output 2: 7-step registration; Register.cshtml.cs; EmailSender stub blocks stage 4; BR-34

processes.name: Catalog Administration (Create/Update/Delete)
processes.evidence: BA Agent 2 Output 5 Value Stream 2: 7-stage admin value stream; BlazorAdmin CatalogItemService; BR-07

processes.name: Database Initialization on Startup
processes.evidence: BA Agent 2 Output 2: 7-step DB init; CatalogContextSeed, AppIdentityDbContextSeed; BR-37, BR-38, BR-39

rules.name: Immutable product snapshot on order
rules.evidence: CatalogItemOrdered value object in OrderItem; OrderService reads catalog then creates snapshot

rules.name: Price frozen at basket-add time
rules.evidence: BA Agent 2 Output 3 BR-22: price comes from BasketItem.UnitPrice, not current catalog

rules.name: Basket NOT cleared after order
rules.evidence: OrderService.CreateOrderAsync does not call BasketService.DeleteBasketAsync; BA Agent 2 Output 3 BR-26

rules.name: CRITICAL: Hardcoded credentials in source
rules.evidence: src/ApplicationCore/Constants/AuthorizationConstants.cs: JWT_SECRET_KEY, AUTH_KEY, DEFAULT_PASSWORD all hardcoded with TODO warnings

rules.name: Email confirmation broken (stub)
rules.evidence: EmailSender.SendEmailAsync returns Task.CompletedTask; registration confirmation never delivered

roles.name: Registered Customer
roles.evidence: Cookie-authenticated user; Login.cshtml.cs; Checkout [Authorize]; demouser@microsoft.com seeded

roles.name: Anonymous Visitor
roles.evidence: No auth required on GET catalog endpoints; BASKET_COOKIENAME anonymous session; Checkout.cshtml.cs Guid.NewGuid() basket id

entities.name: CatalogItem
entities.evidence: src/ApplicationCore/Entities/CatalogItem.cs; DbSet<CatalogItem> in CatalogContext; 3 EF migrations; table Catalog.CatalogItems

entities.name: BasketItem
entities.evidence: src/ApplicationCore/Entities/BasketAggregate/BasketItem.cs; DbSet<BasketItem>; FK to Basket and CatalogItemId

entities.name: Address
entities.evidence: src/ApplicationCore/Entities/OrderAggregate/Address.cs; EF OwnsOne on Order.ShipToAddress; column constraints in OrderConfiguration.cs

entities.name: CatalogItemOrdered
entities.evidence: src/ApplicationCore/Entities/OrderAggregate/CatalogItemOrdered.cs; EF OwnsOne on OrderItem.ItemOrdered; immutable snapshot of CatalogItem at order time

entities.name: Buyer
entities.evidence: src/ApplicationCore/Entities/BuyerAggregate/Buyer.cs exists; NOT in CatalogContext DbSets; NOT in any migration; 0 instantiations in 43 tests; DEAD CODE

entities.name: PaymentMethod
entities.evidence: src/ApplicationCore/Entities/BuyerAggregate/PaymentMethod.cs; CardId/Alias/Last4 fields; PCI compliance comment; NOT persisted; DEAD CODE

entities.name: ApplicationUser
entities.evidence: ASP.NET Core Identity IdentityUser<string>; AppIdentityDbContext; seeded in AppIdentityDbContextSeed.cs

databases.name: CatalogDB (Microsoft.eShopOnWeb.CatalogDb)
databases.evidence: CatalogContext; 3 migrations (InitialModel 2020-12, FixBuyerId 2021-10, FixShipToAddress 2021-12); tables: CatalogBrands, CatalogTypes, CatalogItems, Baskets, BasketItems, Orders, OrderItems

databases.name: IdentityDB (Microsoft.eShopOnWeb.Identity)
databases.evidence: AppIdentityDbContext : IdentityDbContext<ApplicationUser>; 1 migration (InitialIdentityModel 2020-12); standard 7 ASP.NET Identity tables

data_quality_issues.name: No UNIQUE index on CatalogItem.Name
data_quality_issues.evidence: DA Agent 2: BR-02 enforcement at API layer only; no DB UNIQUE constraint; migration required

data_quality_issues.name: Non-atomic basket transfer (3 SaveChanges)
data_quality_issues.evidence: DA Agent 1 DQ-07: TransferBasketAsync has 3 separate SaveChangesAsync calls; no wrapping transaction

data_quality_issues.name: All tests use EF InMemory — FK/UNIQUE constraints untested
data_quality_issues.evidence: DA Agent 2: 43 tests use UseInMemoryDatabase; EF InMemory does not enforce FK/UNIQUE/NULL constraints

data_quality_issues.name: Buyer/PaymentMethod confirmed dead code
data_quality_issues.evidence: DA Agent 2: 0 instantiations across all 43 tests; not in CatalogContext or AppIdentityDbContext; confidence raised to 0.85

services.name: EfRepository<T>
services.evidence: src/Infrastructure/Data/EfRepository.cs; extends RepositoryBase<T>; implements IRepository<T> and IReadRepository<T>

services.name: BasketQueryService
services.evidence: src/Infrastructure/Data/Queries/BasketQueryService.cs; CountTotalBasketItems(string); bypasses IRepository — direct EF LINQ for performance

services.name: EmailSender (STUB)
services.evidence: src/Infrastructure/Services/EmailSender.cs; SendEmailAsync returns Task.CompletedTask; no real email logic

services.name: CachedCatalogViewModelService
services.evidence: src/Web/Services/CachedCatalogViewModelService.cs; IMemoryCache decorator; 30s sliding expiration; cache keys brands/types/items-{page}-{brand}-{type}

services.name: CachedCatalogItemServiceDecorator
services.evidence: src/BlazorAdmin/Services/CachedCatalogItemServiceDecorator.cs; Blazored.LocalStorage; 1-minute TTL; immediate cache invalidation on mutation

ui_components.name: Web (ASP.NET Core MVC/Razor Pages)
ui_components.evidence: src/Web/; eshopwebmvc container; port 5106:8080; Login, Register, ConfirmEmail pages confirmed; catalog/basket/checkout pages ASSUMED

ui_components.name: BlazorAdmin (Blazor WASM SPA)
ui_components.evidence: src/BlazorAdmin/; hosted inside Web project; catalog CRUD UI; CustomAuthStateProvider; 60s auth cache

ui_components.name: PublicApi (Minimal API + Swagger)
ui_components.evidence: src/PublicApi/; eshoppublicapi container; port 5200:8080; Swagger at /swagger; Ardalis.ApiEndpoints + MinimalApi.Endpoint

architecture_patterns.name: Clean Architecture (DDD-Lite)
architecture_patterns.evidence: AA Agent 1: ApplicationCore (domain) → Infrastructure → Presentation dependency flow; IAggregateRoot; IRepository<T>; Ardalis.Specification

architecture_patterns.name: DDD Aggregate Root Pattern
architecture_patterns.evidence: AA Agent 2 AP-04: private collections exposed as IReadOnlyCollection<T>; all mutation through aggregate methods only

architecture_patterns.name: Cache-Aside Decorator (Server, 30s)
architecture_patterns.evidence: AA Agent 2 AP-07: CachedCatalogViewModelService; IMemoryCache; CacheHelpers.DefaultCacheDuration = 30s

architecture_patterns.name: Cache-Aside Decorator (Client, 60s)
architecture_patterns.evidence: AA Agent 2 AP-08: CachedCatalogItemServiceDecorator; Blazored.LocalStorage; 1-minute TTL; immediate invalidation on write

architecture_patterns.name: HiLo Key Generation (CatalogItem)
architecture_patterns.evidence: AA Agent 2 AP-13: UseHiLo('catalog_hilo') in CatalogItemConfiguration.cs; other entities use default identity

violations.name: Shared CatalogContext spans 3 domain boundaries
violations.evidence: AA Agent 1 finding 2: Basket, Order, Catalog share one EF DbContext; main migration blocker for service extraction

violations.name: OrderService reads Basket aggregate internals
violations.evidence: AA Agent 1 finding 3: CreateOrderAsync reads IRepository<Basket> directly; cross-aggregate coupling

violations.name: BasketQueryService bypasses IRepository pattern
violations.evidence: BA Agent 1 Chunk 4 VQ item 9: direct _dbContext.SumAsync for CountTotalBasketItems; intentional performance optimization

violations.name: MediatR applied only to read side (Web)
violations.evidence: AA Agent 2 AP-03: MediatR only in GetMyOrdersHandler/GetOrderDetailsHandler; ALL writes bypass MediatR

runtime.name: .NET SDK 8.0.x
runtime.evidence: global.json rollForward: latestFeature; LTS until November 2026

runtime.name: Entity Framework Core 8.0.2
runtime.evidence: Directory.Packages.props; EF Core SqlServer + InMemory providers

libraries.name: MediatR 12.0.1
libraries.evidence: Directory.Packages.props; used only for read queries in Web project

libraries.name: AutoMapper 12.0.1
libraries.evidence: Directory.Packages.props; CatalogItemListPagedEndpoint maps CatalogItem to CatalogItemDto

libraries.name: Ardalis.Specification 7.0.0
libraries.evidence: Directory.Packages.props; 8 specification classes; all entity queries

libraries.name: Swashbuckle.AspNetCore 6.5.0
libraries.evidence: Directory.Packages.props; OpenAPI spec at /swagger/v1/swagger.json; enabled in PublicApi only

security.name: Cookie Authentication (Web, 60min)
security.evidence: CookieAuthenticationDefaults; HttpOnly=true; SecurePolicy=Always; SameSite=Lax; 60min expiry; revocation via IMemoryCache

security.name: Azure Managed Identity (Web→KeyVault)
security.evidence: Azure.Identity 1.10.4; ChainedTokenCredential; production Web only; PublicApi has NO Key Vault access

infrastructure.name: Azure App Service (B1 Linux)
infrastructure.evidence: infra/core/host/appservice.bicep; dotnetcore|8.0; httpsOnly:true; TLS 1.2; alwaysOn:true; Web service ONLY

infrastructure.name: Azure Key Vault (standard)
infrastructure.evidence: infra/core/security/keyvault.bicep; secrets get+list for App Service managed identity; SQL passwords and connection strings stored

infrastructure.name: Azure Application Insights (provisioning unknown)
infrastructure.evidence: TA Agent 1: referenced as existing in appservice.bicep; APPLICATIONINSIGHTS_CONNECTION_STRING env key; no provisioning Bicep found; TD-07 in TA output

cicd.name: GitHub Actions — Build + Test
cicd.evidence: .github/workflows/dotnetcore.yml; dotnet build + dotnet test; all branches; NO deploy, NO SAST, NO secret scan

cicd.name: GitHub Dependabot
cicd.evidence: .github/dependabot.yml; daily NuGet scan; raises PRs only — NOT a blocking gate

technical_debt.name: JWT_SECRET_KEY hardcoded in source
technical_debt.evidence: src/ApplicationCore/Constants/AuthorizationConstants.cs:10; used live at PublicApi/Program.cs:54 and IdentityTokenClaimService.cs:26

technical_debt.name: DEFAULT_PASSWORD hardcoded (Pass@word1)
technical_debt.evidence: src/ApplicationCore/Constants/AuthorizationConstants.cs:12; AppIdentityDbContextSeed.cs creates admin+demo users with this password on every startup

technical_debt.name: Azure SQL firewall open to all IPs
PublicApi has no Azure deployment path
technical_debt.evidence: azure.yaml declares only 'web' service; PublicApi/Program.cs has no Key Vault branch; cannot run in Azure as configured

cross_links.evidence: BasketItem.CatalogItemId int FK to CatalogItem; no EF navigation property — ID only cross-domain reference
CatalogItemOrdered captures CatalogItem.Id, Name, PictureUri at order creation; immutable after creation (BR-21)
OrderService.CreateOrderAsync reads IRepository<Basket> to build order lines; cross-aggregate coupling (VIO-002)
OrderService.CreateOrderAsync reads IRepository<CatalogItem> to build CatalogItemOrdered snapshots
Login.cshtml.cs calls IBasketService.TransferBasketAsync on successful login (BR-17)
BlazorAdmin CatalogItemService calls POST/PUT/DELETE /api/catalog-items with JWT Bearer
BlazorAdmin CatalogItemService.ListPaged calls GET /api/catalog-items
BlazorAdmin CustomAuthStateProvider calls POST /api/authenticate to get JWT token
JWT token claims populated from ASP.NET Identity roles via UserManager.GetRolesAsync in IdentityTokenClaimService
IdentityTokenClaimService reads UserManager<ApplicationUser> backed by AppIdentityDbContext
CatalogContext.CatalogItems DbSet; EF migrations; HiLo sequence catalog_hilo
CatalogContext.Set<Basket>() via EfRepository; 10-year anonymous basket cookie creates persistent baskets (NFR-06)
CatalogContext.Set<Order>(); OrderService.CreateOrderAsync persists via EfRepository
BR-07: only ADMINISTRATORS may create/update/delete catalog items; all read endpoints are anonymous
Checkout [Authorize] requires authenticated user; anonymous visitors cannot place orders
Azure Key Vault stores AZURE-SQL-CATALOG-CONNECTION-STRING; read by Web App Service via Managed Identity
Azure Key Vault stores AZURE-SQL-IDENTITY-CONNECTION-STRING; read by Web App Service via Managed Identity
PublicApi connects to CatalogDB; shares same CatalogContext as Web — VIO-001 shared database antipattern
Web (eshopwebmvc) connects to CatalogDB via EfRepository for all basket/order/catalog reads
Anonymous Basket Transfer capability implemented by TransferAnonymousBasketToUserAsync process
Basket auto-created on first add; BR-13
Order placement blocked by empty basket; EmptyBasketOnCheckoutException
Product snapshot at order time; CatalogItemOrdered value object
Price frozen at basket-add time; BasketItem.UnitPrice used in order lines
Place Order process implemented by OrderService.CreateOrderAsync
API Auth process implemented by IdentityTokenClaimService.GetTokenAsync
Buyer.IdentityGuid designed to link to ApplicationUser.Id; linkage NOT active (Buyer not persisted); DISC-002
Hardcoded JWT_SECRET_KEY allows any repo reader to forge valid JWT tokens accepted by PublicApi
Hardcoded DEFAULT_PASSWORD creates exploitable admin account on every fresh deployment
CachedCatalogViewModelService caches CatalogItem read model; no write-through invalidation; may serve stale after PublicApi mutations
CachedCatalogItemServiceDecorator caches catalog in browser localStorage; immediate invalidation on mutation from same admin session

assumptions.description: Web Razor pages for catalog browsing, basket management, checkout, and order history exist and function correctly
assumptions.rationale: Confirmed by service interfaces (IBasketService, IOrderService, ICatalogViewModelService), specifications (CustomerOrdersSpecification), and BlazorAdmin service structure; but source files not in extraction payload
assumptions.impact: BA Agent 1 VQ item 7; 4 capabilities marked ASSUMED in BA Agent 2 OUTPUT 7

assumptions.description: BASKET_COOKIENAME cookie name is defined in Web project constants file not extracted; behavior is confirmed via Login.cshtml.cs usage
assumptions.rationale: BA Agent 1 VQ item 8: cookie used for anonymous basket transfer; Checkout.cshtml.cs creates 10-year Guid basket cookie; functional behavior fully documented
assumptions.impact: Cookie name unknown; all business behavior confirmed

assumptions.description: Buyer and PaymentMethod entities are planned future features for a payment integration, not permanent dead code
assumptions.rationale: PCI compliance comment in PaymentMethod.CardId; IdentityGuid link to ApplicationUser suggests deliberate design intent; DA Agent 2 raised confidence to 0.85 that they are currently unused
assumptions.impact: Forward engineering should plan Buyer/PaymentMethod as phase 2 feature, not exclude

assumptions.description: Azure Application Insights is manually provisioned outside this repository and connected via APPLICATIONINSIGHTS_CONNECTION_STRING environment variable
assumptions.rationale: TA Agent 2 VQ item 7: referenced as 'existing' in Bicep but no provisioning resource found; may be in a separate infrastructure repo or Azure portal provisioning
assumptions.impact: Observability gap — platform telemetry present but no application SDK wired

assumptions.description: SignalR client declared in libman.json represents a planned real-time feature (e.g., live inventory updates) not yet implemented on the server side
assumptions.rationale: aspnet-signalr@1.0.27 in libman.json with no server-side hub; could be dead from a prior implementation or aspirational; TA Agent 2 TD-16
assumptions.impact: Remove or implement; current state adds dead JS weight to every page load

assumptions.description: The checkout page in the Web project currently uses the hardcoded address and is not production-ready; address collection UI exists or is planned
assumptions.rationale: TA Agent 2 TD-09: Checkout.cshtml.cs:57 hardcodes '123 Main St., Kent, OH'; this is a known reference application simplification
assumptions.impact: Forward engineering must implement shipping address form collection as a requirement

normalization_log.resolution: RESOLVED — intentional separation; domain entity is the EF-persisted record; BlazorShared DTO adds PictureBase64/PictureName for image upload; two distinct types with same simple name in different namespaces
normalization_log.resolved_canonical_id: ENT-001 (entity), note separate DTO in BlazorShared

normalization_log.description: Buyer entity: exists in BA domain model (BuyerAggregate) but absent from DA schema (CatalogContext) and all 43 tests
normalization_log.resolution: RESOLVED — Buyer and PaymentMethod are dead code in current implementation; not in any DbContext; 0 test instantiations; confirmed by DA Agent 2 confidence 0.85; flagged as DQ-004 and ASMP-003

normalization_log.description: Order has no status/lifecycle field — BA Agent 1 flagged as possible gap, BA Agent 2 and AA Agent 1 confirm absent by design
normalization_log.resolution: RESOLVED — Order is a single terminal write record in this version; no post-creation workflow exists; flagged as Pain Point PP-01 in BA Agent 2 and APP-RISK-001 in AA Agent 1

normalization_log.description: EmailSender wired in DI and appears functional but SendEmailAsync returns Task.CompletedTask
normalization_log.resolution: RESOLVED — confirmed full stub across all layers; registration confirmation, order confirmation, and password reset are all silently no-ops; TD-08 in TA Agent 2

normalization_log.description: PublicApi service: TA Agent 1 listed PublicApi in component map as a deployed service; TA Agent 2 confirmed it has NO Azure deployment path
normalization_log.resolution: RESOLVED — azure.yaml declares 'web' service only; PublicApi/Program.cs has no Key Vault integration branch; PublicApi cannot run in Azure as currently configured; TD-12 in TA Agent 2

normalization_log.description: Post-checkout basket state: BA BR-26 confirms basket NOT cleared; AA OQ-008 asked whether checkout controller clears basket; TA Agent 2 confirms two separate SaveChanges calls
normalization_log.resolution: RESOLVED — basket is NOT auto-cleared by OrderService.CreateOrderAsync; whether Web checkout page calls DeleteBasketAsync separately is unverifiable without checkout page source (ASMP-001); flagged as Automation Opportunity AO-04

normalization_log.description: JWT configuration: TA Agent 1 said JWT config 'NOT found in any config file'; TA Agent 2 found JWT_SECRET_KEY hardcoded in AuthorizationConstants.cs compiled into binary
normalization_log.resolution: RESOLVED — key is NOT in config files by design; it is hardcoded as a constant in C# source; this is WORSE than a missing config value — it is committed to source control; TD-01 and critical security escalation in TA Agent 2

normalization_log.description: Web project has limited extraction coverage; BA Agent 1 Chunk 6 and BA Agent 2 both flag 4 capabilities as ASSUMED
normalization_log.resolution: PARTIAL — Login, Register, ConfirmEmail analysed; Browse/Basket/Checkout/OrderHistory pages source not available; behavior confirmed via service interfaces; exact flows marked ASSUMED

normalization_log.description: TA Agent 1 stated 'JWT bearer auth (Web + PublicApi + Infrastructure)'; TA Agent 2 confirmed Web uses COOKIE auth, not JWT; Web issues JWT tokens for BlazorAdmin but validates cookies for its own sessions
normalization_log.resolution: RESOLVED — corrected in TA Agent 2 OUTPUT 5; Web uses CookieAuthenticationDefaults for its own session; JWT is PublicApi-only for machine-to-machine; BlazorAdmin relays JWT obtained from Web /User endpoint

open_questions.question: Do the Web Razor pages for catalog browsing, basket management, checkout, and order history implement all expected business rules correctly?
open_questions.suggested_action: Extract src/Web/Pages/ directory contents and run BA Agent on checkout and order history pages specifically

open_questions.question: What is the exact value of the BASKET_COOKIENAME constant?
open_questions.blocking: Non-blocking; behavior confirmed; exact name needed for cookie documentation and forward engineering
open_questions.suggested_action: Read src/Web/Constants.cs or equivalent file in Web project constants folder

open_questions.question: Has the JWT_SECRET_KEY been rotated in any non-development deployment of this application?
open_questions.blocking: Critical security assessment; determines blast radius of TD-01
open_questions.suggested_action: Security audit: check Key Vault for any eshop-related JWT secrets; check if any production deployment exists with non-default key

open_questions.question: Does the Web checkout controller/page call BasketService.DeleteBasketAsync after successful order creation?
open_questions.blocking: Resolves BR-26 / AO-04 ambiguity; determines whether basket-clearing is already implemented in Web layer

open_questions.question: Is Buyer/PaymentMethod planned for an upcoming payment integration, or are these entities scheduled for removal?
open_questions.blocking: Determines forward engineering scope for payment processing capability
open_questions.suggested_action: Product owner decision; if payment is in roadmap, plan Stripe integration using existing PaymentMethod structure

open_questions.question: What is the intended deployment topology for PublicApi in production? Merge into Web, separate App Service, or containerized deployment?
open_questions.blocking: TD-12: PublicApi has no Azure deployment path; forward engineering cannot define deployment architecture without this decision
open_questions.suggested_action: Architecture decision required: option A — deploy PublicApi as separate App Service with its own Key Vault integration; option B — merge PublicApi into Web project

open_questions.question: Is Azure Application Insights manually provisioned, in a separate infrastructure repository, or not yet provisioned at all?
open_questions.blocking: Observability gap assessment; determines whether APPLICATIONINSIGHTS_CONNECTION_STRING in Bicep is actionable
open_questions.suggested_action: Check Azure subscription for existing Application Insights resources; check if a separate infra repo exists

open_questions.question: What is the purpose of aspnet-signalr@1.0.27 in libman.json? Is this a planned feature (e.g., live inventory count) or dead code?
open_questions.blocking: TD-16: dead client JS added to every page load
open_questions.suggested_action: Remove immediately if no server-side hub is planned; or prioritize implementing the server-side hub if real-time is a roadmap item

open_questions.question: Which project serves the GET /User endpoint consumed by BlazorAdmin's CustomAuthStateProvider?
open_questions.blocking: AA Agent 1 OQ-007: required for auth service design in forward engineering
open_questions.suggested_action: Read src/Web/Controllers/UserController.cs — confirmed as Web project per TA Agent 2 AP-11

open_questions.question: Is there a database backup and point-in-time recovery policy configured for the Azure SQL databases?
open_questions.blocking: DR posture cannot be assessed without backup configuration; TA Agent 2 OUTPUT 8 found no backup declarations in Bicep
open_questions.suggested_action: Check Azure SQL configuration in portal; add backup policy declarations to Bicep if absent

open_questions.question: What are the expected RTO and RPO targets for this system?
open_questions.blocking: NFR-SPEC cannot be completed without availability targets; no SLA declarations found
open_questions.suggested_action: Business/product owner decision; feeds into multi-region, backup retention, and incident response planning

open_questions.question: Is DuplicateException (for catalog item name uniqueness) enforced at the service layer or only at the API layer, and where exactly is it called?
open_questions.blocking: BA Agent 2 VQ item 11: DuplicateException exists but call site not in extracted source
open_questions.suggested_action: Grep for 'DuplicateException' in full source tree to find all throw sites
